subcodes.first_line: O Lord! This is Thy handmaid who hath believed in the Dawning-Place of the Sun of Thy Oneness and the Rising-Point of the Orb of Thy Unity, and hath witnessed Thy signs [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اللهم هذه امتک التی آمنت بمشرق شمس فردانیتک و مطلع نیر وحدانیتک و شاهدت ایاتک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for women, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
